rows.label: tlk70000051_02_msg0001
rows.name:
Being the leader of the Invidians
here sounds like a fine title, but
it's actually kind of boring.

rows.label: tlk70000051_02_msg0002
rows.name:
Training the squad, monster
subjugations... and keeping
my men in line.

rows.label: tlk70000051_02_msg0003
rows.name:
If we cause trouble with
the people where we're staying,
it burdens us and Adel-sama too.

rows.label: tlk70000051_02_msg0004
rows.name:
If I had my way, we'd march off
tomorrow to win some great military
victory. Guts and glory! But...*sigh*

rows.label: tlk70000051_02_msg0005
rows.name:
Hey, don't tell Mars I've been
saying stuff like this. He'll
give me grief about it.

rows.label: tlk70000051_02_msg0006
rows.name:
The other day he was going on
about "what it means to be a
leader". It fair does my head in.

rows.label: tlk70000051_02_msg0007
rows.name:
Probably my fault for getting
him so drunk, eh? Ha ha ha!
